case_title: BERNEDETTE BELL VS. LYFT INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-04-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-27-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY GILLIAN DOUGLAS, PARALEGAL. DEFENDANT HERTZ CORPORATION IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. REPRESENTATIVE INDICATED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WITH PLAINTIFF. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE APRIL 27TH HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
